field_occurrences.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

original_field.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

field_occurrences.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

original_field.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

notes: mixed_timeseries 是标准 chart data API 图，不是 legacy 图；MixedTimeseries/buildQuery.ts 会把 root form_data 拆成 Query A 和 Query B 两个 query context。
Mixed Chart 的 Query B 查询字段和高级分析字段使用 _b 后缀，但 Query B 的图表样式字段使用大写 B 后缀，例如 metrics_b / groupby_b 对应 seriesTypeB / areaB / yAxisIndexB。
buildQuery.ts 先 removeFormDataSuffix(baseFormData, '_b') 得到 Query A，再 retainFormDataSuffix(baseFormData, '_b') 得到 Query B；这意味着 _b 后缀字段会参与查询构造，而 B 后缀字段只在 transformProps.ts 中参与图形渲染。
controlPanel.tsx 复用了 richTooltipSection，但其中 showTooltipTotal / showTooltipPercentage 的 visibility 显式排除了 VizType.MixedTimeseries，因此这两个字段不会成为 Mixed Chart 的有效控件。
MixedTimeseries/types.ts 暴露了 truncateYAxisSecondary，但 controlPanel.tsx 没有对应控件，且 transformProps.ts 的 secondary y-axis 仍使用 truncateYAxis 作为 scale 开关。

Chart Title section 的默认值来自 chartTitle.tsx；MixedTimeseries/types.ts 的 runtime DEFAULT_FORM_DATA 又继承了 plugins/plugin-chart-echarts/src/constants.ts 中的 DEFAULT_TITLE_FORM_DATA，两者存在 margin / position 默认值差异。
embedding 场景仍应优先复制保存态 form_data，再仅通过 extra_form_data 追加过滤和时间上下文。

Shared Query Fields.enum_source: datasource columns; xAxisMixin 会在 granularity_sqla 已存在且 x_axis 为空时回填

Shared Query Fields.description: Select a time grain for the visualization. The grain is the time interval represented by a single point on the chart.

Query A.description: Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.

Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data. Dimensions affect the level of detail in the view.
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Filters。
Query A.enum_source: dataset columns + saved metrics + 当前 metrics

Query A.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
Whether to sort descending or ascending
Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.

Advanced analytics Query A.description: Defines a rolling window function to apply, works along with the [Periods] text box
Defines the size of the rolling window function, relative to the time granularity selected
The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value.
Overlay one or more timeseries from a relative time period. Expects relative time deltas in natural language. Free text is supported.
Advanced analytics Query A.notes: buildQuery.ts 会把 time_compare 写入 Query A 的 time_offsets。

Advanced analytics Query A.description: How to display time shifts: as individual lines; as the difference between the main time series and each time shift; as the percentage change; or as the ratio between series and time shifts.

Query B.description: Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.

Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data. Dimensions affect the level of detail in the view.
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Filters。
Query B.enum_source: dataset columns + saved metrics + 当前 metrics_b

Query B.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered.

Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
Whether to sort descending or ascending
Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.

Advanced analytics Query B.description: Defines a rolling window function to apply, works along with the [Periods] text box
Defines the size of the rolling window function, relative to the time granularity selected
The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value.
Overlay one or more timeseries from a relative time period. Expects relative time deltas in natural language. Free text is supported.
Advanced analytics Query B.notes: 仅 Query B 使用；buildQuery.ts 会把它写入第二个 query 的 time_offsets。

Advanced analytics Query B.description: How to display time shifts: as individual lines; as the difference between the main time series and each time shift; as the percentage change; or as the ratio between series and time shifts.

Chart Options / Shared.description: The color scheme for rendering chart
When unchecked, colors from the selected color scheme will be used for time shifted series
Add Query A and Query B identifiers to tooltips to help differentiate series

Chart Options / Query A.description: Stack series on top of each other
Draw area under curves. Only applicable for line types.
Whether to display the numerical values within the cells
Only show the total value on the stacked chart, and not show on the selected category
Chart Options / Query A.notes: controlPanel 默认值为 true；MixedTimeseries/types.ts 的 runtime DEFAULT_FORM_DATA 未显式提供 onlyTotal。
Mixed Chart controlPanel 未像普通 Line Chart 那样把 opacity 显示条件绑定到 area=true。

Chart Options / Query A.description: Draw a marker on data points. Only applicable for line types.
Size of marker. Also applies to forecast observations.
Chart Options / Query A.notes: Mixed Chart controlPanel 未把 markerSize 的显示条件绑定到 markerEnabled=true。

Chart Options / Query A.description: Based on what should series be ordered on the chart and legend

Chart Options / Query B.description: Stack series on top of each other
Draw area under curves. Only applicable for line types.
Whether to display the numerical values within the cells
Only show the total value on the stacked chart, and not show on the selected category
Chart Options / Query B.notes: controlPanel 默认值为 true；visibility 回调仍引用 Query A 的 show_value / stack，而不是 show_valueB / stackB。

Chart Options / Query B.description: Draw a marker on data points. Only applicable for line types.
Size of marker. Also applies to forecast observations.
Based on what should series be ordered on the chart and legend

Chart Options / Legend.description: Whether to display a legend for the chart

Chart Options / X Axis.description: D3 time format syntax: https://github.com/d3/d3-time-format. When using other than adaptive formatting, labels may overlap
Input field supports custom rotation. e.g. 30 for 30°
Choose how many X-Axis labels to show
Truncate X Axis. Can be overridden by specifying a min or max bound. Only applicable for numerical X axis.

Bounds for numerical X axis. Not applicable for temporal or categorical axes. When left empty, the bounds are dynamically defined based on the min/max of the data. It only expands the axis range, not narrow the data extent.

Chart Options / Tooltip.description: Shows a list of all series available at that point in time
Whether to sort tooltip by the selected metric in descending order.
Tooltip time format; shared control derives from x_axis_time_format.

Chart Options / Y Axis.description: Draw split lines for minor y-axis ticks
Truncate Y Axis. Can be overridden by specifying a min or max bound.
Chart Options / Y Axis.notes: transformProps.ts 会把该字段同时用于主轴和副轴的 scale；truncateYAxisSecondary 没有对应控件。

Chart Options / Y Axis.description: Bounds for the primary Y-axis. When left empty, the bounds are dynamically defined based on the min/max of the data. This feature only expands the axis range.

Chart Options / Y Axis.enum_source: D3_FORMAT_OPTIONS; comparison_type=percentage 时仅保留百分比格式

Chart Options / Y Axis.description: Bounds for the secondary Y-axis. When left empty, the bounds are dynamically defined based on the min/max of the data.
